# BankForge.ai

> BankForge is a compliance intelligence platform for regulated
> financial institutions. We scan public digital presences for
> regulatory compliance gaps and AI visibility signals — before
> the next examination cycle.

## What BankForge does

- Scrapes public-facing websites of banks, credit unions, and RIAs
- Runs compliance checks against UDAAP, Reg Z, Reg DD,
  Fair Lending, FFIEC guidance, and SEC Marketing Rule
  (Rule 206(4)-1) criteria
- Computes GEO visibility scores across 66,000+ institutions
- Severity-grades findings (High / Medium / Low) with
  regulatory citations
- Delivers structured findings reports reviewed by a team
  with examiner-side experience at $100B+ institutions
- Offers GEO Remediation to improve AI search visibility

## Who we serve

- Community banks ($500M–$5B assets) — UDAAP, Reg Z, Reg DD,
  Fair Lending, FFIEC digital presence monitoring
  URL: https://bankforge.ai/for-banks
- Credit unions — same compliance frameworks under NCUA supervision
  URL: https://bankforge.ai/for-credit-unions
- SEC-registered Investment Advisers (RIAs) — Marketing Rule
  compliance, Reg S-P, SEC examination preparation
  URL: https://bankforge.ai/for-rias

## Key regulatory frameworks covered

- SEC Marketing Rule / Rule 206(4)-1 (testimonials,
  third-party ratings, performance advertising)
- Regulation S-P (privacy notices)
- UDAAP (Unfair, Deceptive, or Abusive Acts or Practices)
- Regulation Z (Truth in Lending — APR disclosures)
- Regulation DD (Truth in Savings — rate advertising)
- Fair Lending / Equal Credit Opportunity Act
- FFIEC digital banking examination guidance
- SAFE Act / RESPA (NMLS identifiers)

## Corpus statistics (March 2026)

- 4,300+ FDIC-insured banks scanned
- 23,000+ SEC-registered RIAs scanned
- 4,400+ credit unions scanned
- Average bank GEO score: 45.8 out of 100
- Average RIA GEO score: 33.3 out of 100
- 83.4% of banks have website accessibility issues
- 92.3% of RIAs have website accessibility issues

## Services

- Compliance Review: one-time structured findings report
- GEO Remediation: AI visibility improvement for financial
  institutions (opening June 2026)
  URL: https://bankforge.ai/geo-remediation

## Research

- Your Bank's AI Score Is Low. Here's Why — and What to Fix
  URL: https://bankforge.ai/insights/bank-ai-score

- Website: https://bankforge.ai
- Email: fernando@bankforge.ai
